modules.name: Vehicle Intelligence Hub
modules.notes: Shared entry point for VIN, specifications, accessories, fluids, service and technical resources.

modules.name: Honda VIN Decoder
modules.notes: Confirmed Australian-market Civic VIN fingerprints with manual fallback and no-guess behaviour.

modules.name: Honda Accessory Database
modules.notes: Website-hosted JSON data with importer and rebuild workflow; legacy Excel pages retained as archive sources.

modules.name: Vehicle Specifications
modules.notes: Engine, power, torque, transmission and drivetrain supported; exact kerb weight, kW/tonne and 0-100 remain unavailable where not verified.

modules.name: Fluids Compatibility
modules.notes: Existing structured cross-brand fluids hub retained.

modules.name: Brand Portals
modules.notes: Existing specialist portals remain available while structured migration continues.

modules.name: Australian VIN Research
modules.notes: Public Australian sources only; uncertain records remain manual-review.

modules.name: Inventory & Ordering
modules.notes: Permission-gated and not merged into Vehicle Intelligence.
